# Diana Glass

> Professional glass installation services in South Sulawesi.
Transforming residential, commercial, and architectural spaces with premium glass solutions.

## Company
- Name: Diana Glass
- Parent Organization: PT SANNO
- Website: https://www.dianaflatglass.co.id/
- Headquarters: Makassar, South Sulawesi, Indonesia


## About
Diana Glass is a professional glass contractor and part of PT SANNO, providing high-quality glass installation services and custom glass solutions for residential, commercial, and architectural projects across Indonesia.

## Industry
- Glass Contractor
- Glass Installation
- Architectural Glass
- Aluminium Systems

## Products
- Tempered Glass
- Laminated Glass
- Frameless Glass Doors
- Glass Partitions
- Shower Screens
- Glass Balustrades
- Glass Canopies
- Interior Glass
- Exterior Glass
- Aluminium Systems

## Services
- Glass Installation
- Custom Glass Solutions
- Site Survey
- Glass Measurement
- Professional Installation

## Audience
- Homeowners
- Architects
- Interior Designers
- Contractors
- Developers
- Commercial Property Owners
